productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Slip On Black Formal Shoes
description: Style note Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone loafers in black. Give your semi-formal outfits a twist of style with this suede shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperSoft and flexible suede upper with black patent tassle for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useContrast black patent edging around shoe mouth and white top-stitching around shoeGussets at sides for easy insertion of footLeather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortPadded leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole for durabilityGrooves and texturing below the forefoot and the heelShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean clothUse a suede brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
